subcodes.first_line: O God, my God! This servant hath supplicated unto Thy Kingdom, striven within Thy dominion, and offered up his soul and his endeavours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هذا عبد ابتهل الی ملکوتک و اجتهد فی ملکک و بذل روحه و جهده و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
